name: BB:BehaviorDefinition:  Hide Schedule Task Via Index Value Tamper
notes:
This Building Block detects when the "index" value of a scheduled task is modified from the registry.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali
SIGMA Title: Hide Schedule Task Via Index Value Tamper
SIGMA Description: Detects when the "index" value of a scheduled task is modified from the registry. Which effectively hides it from any tooling such as "schtasks /query" (Read the referenced link for more information about the effects of this technique)


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition:  Hide Schedule Task Via Index Value Tamper on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\schedule\taskcache\tree\%' and LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%index%' and "target details"='dword (0x00000000)') or (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\schedule\taskcache\tree\%' and LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%index%' and "registry value data" ='dword (0x00000000)') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition:  Hide Schedule Task Via Index Value Tamper on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\schedule\taskcache\tree\%' and LOWER("Target Object") LIKE '%index%' and "target details"='dword (0x00000000)') or (LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\schedule\taskcache\tree\%' and LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%index%' and "registry value data" ='dword (0x00000000)') AQL filter query
